mapper.sql: SELECT tb.* FROM tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet AS tb

SELECT tb.id, tb.code, tb.sc_id, tb.take_status, tb.description, tb.update_by, tb.update_time, d.id AS detail_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, p.code AS detail_product_code, s.code AS detail_sku_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, s.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, c.name AS detail_category_name, b.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, d.first_num AS detail_first_num, d.second_num AS detail_second_num, d.rand_num AS detail_rand_num FROM tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet AS tb LEFT JOIN tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet_detail AS d ON d.sheet_id = tb.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = p.brand_id
SELECT tb.id, tb.code, tb.sc_id, tb.take_status, tb.description, tb.create_by, tb.create_time, tb.update_by, tb.update_time FROM tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet AS tb

SELECT tb.product_id, tb.sku_id, p.code AS product_code, s.code AS sku_code, p.name AS product_name, s.sale_property_text AS sale_property_text, c.name AS category_name, b.name AS brand_name, p.spec, p.unit, tb.first_num, tb.second_num, tb.rand_num, sh.take_status FROM tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet_detail AS tb LEFT JOIN tbl_pre_take_stock_sheet AS sh ON sh.id = tb.sheet_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = tb.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.id = tb.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = p.brand_id

SELECT s.id, s.id AS sku_id, g.id AS product_id, g.code, s.code AS sku_code, s.sale_property_text AS sale_property_text, g.name, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.spec, g.unit FROM base_data_product AS g INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.product_id = g.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = g.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = g.brand_id LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = c.id and rm.node_type = 2
mapper.select:
AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%')) )
AND b.id = #{vo.brandId}
AND (c.id = #{vo.categoryId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.categoryId}, rm.path))
AND g.product_type = 1 AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%')) ) AND g.product_type = 1 AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code
